scope: Workbench current data-list, batch groups, Trae session refresh, and frontend order normalization
rules: xm-* belongs to the previous project batch and must not be used by the current Workbench data-list chain.
Current frontend data and batch groups must use may-* only.
If historical input contains xm-123, the runtime must normalize it to may-123 instead of reading old xm data.
Old xm JSON/cache files may remain as archived evidence only; they must not be selected as active data sources.
